title: Create: Currency Shops
description: Adds currency support to Create mod shops
body:
![Create: Currency Shops Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7c70fc199c279dd4a614ae5c01a00e664168c59.png)

This addon for the Create Mod adds a Coin based currency system for use in Table Cloth and Table Cover Shops. Coin Safes, Coin Drafters, Wallets and Credit Cards can be used to store, manage and transfer Coins, making it a useful addition to any world.






Also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-currency-shops).
